invariants.name: Ingress→Egress Data Flow
invariants.evidence: Function reads from outreach.signal_output (ingress), joins with cl.company_identity and lcs.signal_registry (middle), inserts into lcs.signal_queue (egress). Flow contract matches WP flow_contract specification exactly.

invariants.name: Duplicate Detection — Identity Path
invariants.evidence: NOT EXISTS subquery checks lcs.signal_queue for matching source_hub='OUTREACH' AND source_signal_id AND status IN ('PENDING','COMPLETED'). Additionally, ON CONFLICT (source_hub, source_signal_id) DO NOTHING as safety net.

invariants.name: Duplicate Detection — Temporal Path
invariants.evidence: Second NOT EXISTS subquery checks lcs.signal_queue for matching signal_set_hash + sovereign_company_id within run_month date range (date_trunc month boundaries). Prevents same signal type for same company being bridged twice in same month.

invariants.name: Signal Registry Mapping
invariants.description: signal_code from outreach.signal_output must map to signal_set_hash via lcs.signal_registry.
invariants.evidence: JOIN lcs.signal_registry sr ON sr.signal_name = so.signal_code AND sr.is_active = true. Unmapped signal codes are excluded (INNER JOIN). Only active registry entries are used.

invariants.name: Blocker Guard — Missing Source Table
invariants.description: Function must handle missing outreach.signal_output gracefully.
invariants.evidence: IF NOT EXISTS check on information_schema.tables at runtime. Returns blocker_note column: 'BLOCKED — outreach.signal_output does not exist. Source: outreach hub migration required.' Verified: SELECT * FROM lcs.bridge_signal_output() returns blocker row with 0 signals.
